description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Technical Point role is filled by the Spell Team or the Spell Crafter from that group. For each Executive Vote, a
is selected from the Spell Roster to steward the spell development process.

serves as the primary point of contact for the Governance Point and any external parties. If the Spell Crafter is unavailable or if disagreements arise, the Governance Point’s secondary point of contact is the
Input or opinions from external parties on technical details should be treated as informational and should not influence the spell decision-making process.
